name: Koufu Group Limited
summary: Koufu Group Limited, an investment holding company, manages and operates food courts and coffee shops in Singapore and Macau. The company operates in two segments, Outlet & Mall Management and Food and Beverages (F&B) Retail. The Outlet & Mall Management segment operates and/or manages food courts, coffee shops, and a hawker center and a commercial mall. As of December 31, 2019, it operated 50 food courts, including two food courts in Macau, as well as 16 coffee shops, a hawker center, and a commercial mall in Singapore. The F&B Retail segment operates 76 self-operated F&B stalls, including four F&B stalls in Macau; 29 F&B kiosks comprising one in Macau and one in Malaysia; and 7 quick-service and 4 full-service restaurants. The company operates food courts under the Koufu, Rasapura Masters, Cookhouse by Koufu, Fork & Spoon, and Gourmet Paradise brands; coffee shops under the Happy Hawkers, R&B Tea, and 1983-A Taste Of Nanyang brands; full service restaurants under the Elemen brand; quick service restaurants under the Grove, 1983-Coffee & Toast, and Supertea brands; and commercial mall under the Punggol Plaza brand. It also processes food products; leases intangible assets; and engages in letting and operating coffee shops. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Singapore. Koufu Group Limited is a subsidiary of Jun Yuan Holdings Pte Ltd.
